items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man City ahead of Man Unite...
items.summary: England midfielder Elliot Anderson is looking more likely to join Manchester City than Manchester United this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Transfer Big Board: Best players in each position ...
items.summary: The transfer window is open in Premier League and will be soon in Europe, so who is available? It's our big board!

items.title: It's (finally) OK to dream big about the USMNT at ...
items.summary: There's something different about this United States team at the 2026 World Cup: The players feel it, and we can all see it. So why not believe?

items.title: Pulisic sits but U.S. finds a way to reach KO roun...
RHP Misiorowski hits 104.2 mph in Brewers' loss
items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski had another strong outing against the Braves on Friday night, topping out at 104.2 mph, but it may not have been strong enough.

items.title: Paraguay player red-carded for covering mouth
items.summary: Miguel Almirón was shown the red after an altercation in Paraguay's Group B match vs Türkiye.

items.title: Miles' 1st dud as pro a chance to grow, Lynx say
items.summary: Olivia Miles was held to a season-low seven points on 1-of-10 shooting in Friday's 81-75 win over the Valkyries, but the Lynx called the off night "a tremendous growth point" for the rookie sensation.

items.title: Rory 7 back, says anything possible at Shinnecock
items.summary: Rory McIlroy, who posted a 1-over 71 to fall to even par after 36 holes at the U.S. Open on Friday, says seven shots isn't too much to make up at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club.

items.title: Titans, DT Simmons agree to $105M+ extension
items.summary: The Titans and defensive tackle Jeffery Simmons have agreed to a 3-year, $105.8M extension, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter and NFL Network's Ian Rapoport and Mike Garafolo.

items.title: U.S. clinches WC Group D after Paraguay victory
items.summary: Paraguay held on for a 1-0 win over Turkey after playing a man down for more than half the match, a result that secured the United States the top spot in Group D
